content.full_text:
September 7, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Attn: Ms. Linda Cassidy

RE: Stoker for Supervisor Campaign

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

This shall confirm our telephone conference of August 31, 1990, wherein I informed you my campaign inadvertently disbursed a campaign check to cover a personal expense. Specifically, my wife and I purchased a couch with a value of $2,100. By mistake, the check was drawn out of the Stoker for Supervisor account. Upon realizing the mistake, we fully reimbursed the campaign account by a transfer of funds from our personal account.

This letter shall also confirm the fact that you informed me that the appropriate action to take would be report this information on the schedule "E" form in the next reporting period.

I want to thank you for the time and effort you took in regards to evaluating this matter.

Very truly yours,

DICTATED. BUT NOT READ

Mike Stoker

MBS/ec
